# Vivado / Xilinx generated files

.Xil/
*.jou
*.log
*.str
*.zip
*.backup.*
*.bak
*.orig

# Vivado generated project directories

*.cache/
*.hw/
*.runs/
*.sim/
*.gen/
*.ip_user_files/

# Vivado generated reports/checkpoints/bitstreams

*.rpt
*.dcp
*.bit
*.bin
*.ltx
*.mmi
*.mcs
*.prm
*.pb
*.wdb
*.vcd
*.saif

# XSim / simulation output

xsim.dir/
*.wdb
*.vcd
*.log
*.jou
webtalk*.jou
webtalk*.log

# SDK / Vitis generated build output

*.sdk/.metadata/
*.sdk/**/Debug/
*.sdk/**/Release/
*.sdk/**/DebugConfig/
*.sdk/**/ReleaseConfig/
*.sdk/**/bsp/
*.sdk/**/hw/
*.elf
*.o
*.a
*.map
*.lst

# Eclipse/SDK local settings

.project
.cproject
.settings/
.metadata/

# OS/editor junk

.DS_Store
Thumbs.db
.vscode/
.idea/

# Temporary files

*.tmp
*.temp
~$*
